notes: Explicit per-kind output folder overrides consumed by tools/resolve_output.py (detection order: env > config > convention > fallback). Values are kept in sync — by convention, not automatically — with the OUTPUT_KIND_MAP derived from star-alliance-skills/okf/scripts/okf_audit.py's LAYOUT_RULES (see tools/resolve_output.py for the resolver contract and resolve_output.py::OUTPUT_KIND_MAP for the authoritative convention values). If a LAYOUT_RULES target_dir changes, this file must be hand-mirrored to stay in parity.
